meaning: adj.无法形容的,不能以言语表达的,可怕的,坏透了的
examples: The judge described the offences as nauseating and unspeakable.
He told the kaiser that a war between Britain and Germany would be an "unspeakable calamity".
In the face of unspeakable tragedy, the strength of this community has come through.
Those were unspeakable secrets, kept not only from the world but from each other.
